data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Upgrade/downgrade with proration' feature, but the evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. While the use case mentions a member upgrading mid-cycle with a prorated charge applied, there is no concrete evidence or API read that confirms this behavior is implemented or functioning as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the upgrade/downgrade with proration functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
